case_title: TANG FAT ENTERPRISES CO., INC. vs. GARCHA, RUPINDER S. DBA PRINT WORLD et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCHA, RUPINDER S. DBA PRINT WORLD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 26 SECOND STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL MAY-30-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTFF TANG FAT ENTERPRISES SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFT RUPINDER S. GARCHA, DAILY DAMAGES OF $161.06 AFTER MAY 30, 2000 THAT GARCHA REMAINS IN POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $161.06 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG FAT ENTERPRISES CO., INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG FAT ENTERPRISES CO., INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCHA, RUPINDER S. DBA PRINT WORLD DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GARCHA, RUPINDER S. DBA PRINT WORLD
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TANG FAT ENTERPRISES CO., INC. SERVED MAY-01-2000, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCHA, RUPINDER S. DBA PRINT WORLD
MEMO TO SET RETURNED TO PLTF; FORMS SUBMITTED ARE NOT USED IN THIS COURT.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GARCHA, RUPINDER S. DBA PRINT WORLD

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, DECLARATION GRANTED - JUDGE CHIANTELLI. THIS ACTION IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. FILED BY DEFENDANT GARCHA, RUPINDER S. DBA PRINT WORLD JUDGMENT OF MAY-19-2000 SET ASIDE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER COURT ORDER OF 8-28-2000 IN DEPT. 206
